comparison_policy.claim_boundary: optimizer outputs are candidate-generation evidence only; promote turbulent-flux reduction only after matched long post-transient nonlinear audits and convergence gates

landscape_policy.optimization_seed_policy: start from the VMEC-JAX QA_optimization.py simple seed, solve QA/aspect/iota constraints, then append one SPECTRAX-GK transport residual
landscape_policy.rbc11_landscape_role: diagnose objective roughness, metric disagreement, and nonlinear convergence windows

optimizer_ladder_policy.role: solve smooth aspect/iota/QS constraints from the simple seed
continuation and multistart candidate generation for smooth growth/QL residuals
noisy outer-loop comparison with common-random-number audits
refit/re-score only after new independent matched nonlinear holdouts pass gates

entries.command: python3 tools/campaigns/vmex_qa_low_turbulence_optimization.py --input tools_out/vmex_qa_optimizer_comparison_campaign/runs/qa_baseline_scipy/input.final --outdir tools_out/vmex_qa_optimizer_comparison_campaign/runs/growth_scipy_from_strict_baseline --max-mode 5 --min-vmec-mode 7 --disable-mode-continuation --target-aspect 5 --min-iota 0.41 --iota-objective target --disable-iota-profile-floor --aspect-weight 1 --iota-floor-weight 10000 --qs-weight 1 --spectrax-weight 0.1 --transport-kind growth --surfaces 0.64 --alphas 0 --ky-values 0.3 --ntheta 24 --mboz 21 --nboz 21 --n-laguerre 2 --n-hermite 3 --surface-chunk-size 1 --spectrax-objective-transform log1p --spectrax-objective-scale 1 --max-nfev 60 --continuation-nfev 25 --inner-max-iter 140 --trial-max-iter 140 --inner-ftol 1e-09 --trial-ftol 1e-09 --ftol 1e-07 --gtol 1e-07 --xtol 1e-08 --solver-device gpu --save-rerun-wouts --admit-authoritative-rerun-wout --allow-failed-solved-wout-gate --make-plots --method scipy --scipy-tr-solver lsmr --scipy-lsmr-maxiter 200
